creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
1. I left the MASTER_SITES entry for LOCAL/sunpoet/${PORTNAME}/ assuming the latest distfiles will be uploaded there.

2. The en-GB dictionary comes in two version: -ise spelling and -ize spelling.  I chose the -ise spelling, but perhaps a port option to let the user choose would be best.  There are larger dictionaries and that for en-GB includes both spelling, but the authors discourage using the larger dictionaries because they promote inconsistent spelling and they are less tested.
